title: Registered Nurse
description: Assess patient conditions, administer medications, coordinate care plans, and educate patients and families across hospital, clinic, and community settings.

tasks.name: Patient Assessment
tasks.description: Conduct physical and psychological assessments, vital signs monitoring, and intake evaluations to establish baseline patient status.

tasks.name: Medication Administration
tasks.description: Prepare and administer oral, IV, and topical medications; verify dosages; monitor patient responses and document outcomes.

tasks.name: Care Coordination & Documentation
tasks.description: Update electronic health records, coordinate with physicians and specialists, write care plans, and manage handoffs between shifts.

tasks.name: Patient & Family Education
tasks.description: Counsel patients and families on diagnoses, discharge instructions, medications, and self-care routines to improve adherence and outcomes.

title: Radiologist
description: Interpret medical imaging (X-ray, CT, MRI, PET) to diagnose disease, guide interventional procedures, and consult with referring physicians on diagnostic strategies.

tasks.name: Diagnostic Image Interpretation
tasks.description: Systematically review radiological images to identify abnormalities, classify findings, and generate differential diagnoses across imaging modalities.

tasks.name: Radiology Report Writing
tasks.description: Dictate and edit structured reports summarizing imaging findings, clinical correlation, and recommended follow-up actions for referring clinicians.

tasks.name: Clinical Consultation
tasks.description: Discuss complex cases with referring physicians, recommend additional imaging workups, and participate in multidisciplinary tumor boards.

tasks.name: Quality Assurance & Peer Review
tasks.description: Review discrepant cases, participate in peer review programs, and audit AI-assisted reads to maintain diagnostic accuracy standards.

title: Medical Coder
description: Translate clinical documentation into standardized ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS codes for billing, reimbursement, and health records management.

tasks.name: Diagnostic & Procedure Code Assignment
tasks.description: Review physician notes, operative reports, and discharge summaries to assign accurate ICD-10-CM and CPT codes reflecting documented diagnoses and services.

tasks.name: Clinical Documentation Review
tasks.description: Scrutinize provider documentation for completeness, specificity, and compliance with payer requirements; query physicians for clarification.

tasks.name: Compliance Auditing
tasks.description: Audit coded charts for compliance with CMS guidelines, payer contracts, and internal quality standards; prepare for external audits.

tasks.name: Claim Denial Management
tasks.description: Investigate denied claims, identify coding errors or documentation gaps, prepare appeals, and communicate with payers to resolve reimbursement disputes.

title: Physical Therapist
description: Diagnose and treat movement disorders through exercise, manual therapy, and rehabilitation programs to restore function and reduce pain.

tasks.name: Manual Therapy & Hands-on Treatment
tasks.description: Perform joint mobilization, soft tissue manipulation, myofascial release, and therapeutic massage to improve range of motion and reduce pain.

tasks.name: Therapeutic Exercise Prescription
tasks.description: Design, instruct, and progress individualized exercise programs targeting strength, flexibility, balance, and functional mobility deficits.

tasks.name: Patient Evaluation & Goal Setting
tasks.description: Administer functional outcome measures, gait analysis, and strength assessments; establish measurable goals with patients and families.

tasks.name: Progress Notes & Insurance Documentation
tasks.description: Write SOAP notes, initial evaluations, discharge summaries, and prior authorization requests to satisfy payer and regulatory requirements.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Evaluate investment opportunities, build financial models, analyze market trends, and provide data-driven recommendations to support capital allocation decisions.

tasks.name: Financial Modeling & Valuation
tasks.description: Build DCF, LBO, and comparable company analysis models in Excel or Python; stress-test assumptions and synthesize outputs into investment theses.

tasks.name: Market Research & Intelligence Synthesis
tasks.description: Aggregate and interpret macroeconomic data, industry reports, earnings transcripts, and news flow to identify investment signals.

tasks.name: Client Reporting & Presentation
tasks.description: Prepare investment committee memos, board presentations, and client-facing reports communicating portfolio performance and strategic recommendations.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Advisory & Deal Structuring
tasks.description: Advise clients on deal terms, capital structure, and risk management strategies; negotiate with counterparties and coordinate with legal teams.

title: Loan Officer
description: Evaluate, authorize, and recommend approval of loan applications for individuals and businesses by assessing creditworthiness and financial risk.

tasks.name: Credit Underwriting & Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Analyze credit bureau reports, income statements, debt-to-income ratios, and collateral value to determine loan eligibility and pricing.

tasks.name: Loan Application Processing
tasks.description: Collect and verify applicant documentation, enter data into loan origination systems, order appraisals, and track workflow milestones.

tasks.name: Client Consultation & Product Guidance
tasks.description: Meet with prospective borrowers, explain loan products and terms, gather financial goals, and match clients to suitable financing solutions.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Reporting
tasks.description: Ensure loan files comply with RESPA, TILA, HMDA, and fair lending requirements; generate mandatory disclosures and audit-ready documentation.

title: Accountant
description: Prepare financial statements, manage general ledgers, ensure tax compliance, and advise organizations on financial controls and reporting standards.

tasks.name: Bookkeeping & Transaction Processing
tasks.description: Record journal entries, reconcile bank statements, manage accounts payable and receivable, and maintain accurate general ledger balances.

tasks.name: Financial Statement Preparation
tasks.description: Compile income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements in accordance with GAAP or IFRS; prepare management reports and variance analyses.

tasks.name: Tax Preparation & Compliance
tasks.description: Prepare corporate and individual tax returns, research tax code implications, identify planning opportunities, and manage audit correspondence.

tasks.name: Financial Advisory & Internal Controls
tasks.description: Advise management on cost reduction, cash flow optimization, and control improvements; liaise with auditors and regulatory bodies.

title: Insurance Adjuster
description: Investigate insurance claims, assess property or bodily injury damages, determine coverage applicability, and negotiate settlements with claimants and attorneys.

tasks.name: Claim Investigation & Documentation
tasks.description: Gather evidence through field inspections, interviews, police reports, and medical records; document findings in claims management systems.

tasks.name: Damage Valuation & Estimation
tasks.description: Use estimating software and cost databases to compute repair or replacement values for property losses; review medical bills and calculate injury settlements.

tasks.name: Settlement Negotiation
tasks.description: Negotiate claim settlements directly with policyholders, claimants, and plaintiff attorneys; authorize payments within delegated authority.

tasks.name: Policy Coverage Analysis
tasks.description: Interpret policy language, exclusions, and endorsements to determine whether a claim is covered and the applicable limits and deductibles.

title: Software Developer
description: Design, develop, test, and deploy software applications and systems, spanning front-end interfaces, back-end services, and platform infrastructure.

tasks.name: Feature Development & Implementation
tasks.description: Translate product requirements into working code across frontend and backend layers; conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers.

tasks.name: System Architecture & Design
tasks.description: Define technical architecture, select technology stacks, design APIs and data models, and evaluate trade-offs for scalability and maintainability.

tasks.name: Debugging & Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Diagnose defects through log analysis, profilers, and root-cause investigation; optimize bottlenecks in latency, memory, and throughput.

tasks.name: Cross-functional Collaboration
tasks.description: Work with product managers, designers, and QA to refine requirements, conduct sprint ceremonies, and align technical solutions to business goals.

title: Data Scientist
description: Extract insights from large datasets using statistical modeling, machine learning, and data visualization to inform product and business strategy.

tasks.name: ML Model Development & Training
tasks.description: Design and train machine learning models for classification, regression, forecasting, and recommendation; tune hyperparameters and evaluate model performance.

tasks.name: Data Wrangling & Feature Engineering
tasks.description: Clean, transform, and engineer features from raw structured and unstructured data sources; build and maintain data pipelines for model training.

tasks.name: Insight Communication & Storytelling
tasks.description: Translate complex analytical findings into clear narratives, dashboards, and recommendations for non-technical stakeholders and decision-makers.

tasks.name: Research & Experimentation Design
tasks.description: Design A/B tests and causal inference studies; review academic literature to identify novel algorithmic approaches applicable to business problems.

title: IT Support Specialist
description: Provide technical assistance to end users by diagnosing hardware and software issues, managing tickets, configuring systems, and maintaining IT infrastructure.

tasks.name: Help Desk Ticket Resolution
tasks.description: Triage and resolve Level 1 and Level 2 support tickets covering password resets, software errors, connectivity problems, and hardware faults.

tasks.name: System Configuration & Deployment
tasks.description: Image and deploy workstations, configure network settings, install and update software, and manage endpoint security tools.

tasks.name: User Training & Documentation
tasks.description: Train end users on new software and policies; write and maintain knowledge base articles, FAQs, and IT procedure guides.

tasks.name: Infrastructure Monitoring & Incident Response
tasks.description: Monitor network performance dashboards, respond to alerts, coordinate with vendors on outages, and escalate critical incidents to senior engineers.

title: QA Tester
description: Design and execute test plans to verify software quality, identify defects, automate regression suites, and ensure products meet functional and performance requirements.

tasks.name: Automated Test Script Development
tasks.description: Write, maintain, and extend automated regression suites using Selenium, Playwright, or Cypress; integrate tests into CI/CD pipelines.

tasks.name: Manual & Exploratory Testing
tasks.description: Execute manual test cases, perform exploratory testing to uncover edge cases, and validate UI/UX against acceptance criteria and accessibility standards.

tasks.name: Defect Tracking & Triage
tasks.description: Log, reproduce, prioritize, and track defects in Jira; write detailed bug reports with steps to reproduce, expected versus actual behavior, and severity assessments.

tasks.name: Test Strategy & Planning
tasks.description: Develop test strategies, estimate effort, define coverage criteria, and coordinate with developers and product managers on release readiness.

title: K-12 Teacher
description: Plan and deliver instruction aligned to curriculum standards, assess student learning, manage classroom environments, and communicate with families to support student development.

tasks.name: Direct Classroom Instruction
tasks.description: Deliver lessons using varied instructional strategies, facilitate discussions, differentiate for diverse learners, and maintain an engaging classroom environment.

tasks.name: Lesson Planning & Curriculum Design
tasks.description: Design standards-aligned unit plans, select instructional materials, create assessments, and scaffold learning progressions for diverse student needs.

tasks.name: Student Assessment & Grading
tasks.description: Administer formative and summative assessments, grade student work, track progress in gradebooks, and use data to inform instructional adjustments.

tasks.name: Family Communication & Student Support
tasks.description: Communicate with parents and guardians about student progress, facilitate conferences, coordinate with counselors, and provide social-emotional support.

title: College Professor
description: Teach undergraduate and graduate courses, conduct original research, advise students on academic and career pathways, and contribute to departmental governance.

tasks.name: Course Instruction & Facilitation
tasks.description: Deliver lectures, lead seminars and discussions, supervise lab sections, and facilitate online learning environments for undergraduate and graduate students.

tasks.name: Original Research & Publication
tasks.description: Design studies, collect and analyze data, write manuscripts for peer-reviewed journals, and present findings at academic conferences.

tasks.name: Student Advising & Mentorship
tasks.description: Advise students on course selection, career pathways, and research opportunities; mentor thesis and dissertation students through their academic journeys.

tasks.name: Curriculum Development & Assessment Design
tasks.description: Design course syllabi, develop learning outcomes, create assessments, and evaluate instructional effectiveness through student performance data.

title: Instructional Designer
description: Design and develop learning experiences, eLearning modules, and training programs using instructional theory, multimedia authoring tools, and learning analytics.

tasks.name: eLearning Content Development
tasks.description: Author interactive eLearning modules, video scripts, and multimedia learning assets using tools such as Articulate Storyline, Rise, and Adobe Captivate.

tasks.name: Needs Analysis & Learning Design
tasks.description: Conduct interviews and performance gap analyses with subject matter experts to identify learning objectives and map instructional strategies to outcomes.

tasks.name: Assessment & Evaluation Design
tasks.description: Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives; apply Kirkpatrick evaluation models to measure training effectiveness.

tasks.name: LMS Administration & Analytics
tasks.description: Configure and maintain LMS environments (Canvas, Moodle, Cornerstone); analyze learner engagement data and generate completion and performance reports.

title: Assembly Line Worker
description: Perform repetitive assembly operations on production lines, joining components, operating hand and power tools, and maintaining output quotas while adhering to safety standards.

tasks.name: Component Assembly & Fastening
tasks.description: Join parts using hand tools, pneumatic torque drivers, and jigs following standardized work instructions; perform sub-assembly operations at fixed workstations.

tasks.name: In-process Quality Checks
tasks.description: Inspect assembled units against visual and dimensional standards; flag defects, record rejections in production logs, and escalate to quality control.

tasks.name: Materials Handling & Line Replenishment
tasks.description: Transport raw materials and components to workstations using carts and hoists; maintain inventory of fasteners and consumables on the production line.

tasks.name: Production Documentation
tasks.description: Record production counts, downtime events, and defect codes in digital or paper-based production logs at end of each shift.

title: Quality Control Inspector
description: Inspect products and materials for defects, measure dimensional tolerances, document nonconformances, and collaborate with production teams to maintain quality standards.

tasks.name: Visual & Dimensional Inspection
tasks.description: Examine products using calipers, gauges, and optical comparators; identify surface defects, dimensional out-of-tolerance conditions, and assembly errors.

tasks.name: Statistical Process Control
tasks.description: Collect and chart measurement data using SPC software; analyze control charts for trends, calculate Cpk, and identify assignable causes of variation.

tasks.name: Nonconformance Reporting
tasks.description: Create and track nonconformance reports (NCRs), coordinate with engineering and production on root cause analysis and corrective action plans.

tasks.name: Supplier & Process Auditing
tasks.description: Conduct first-article inspections, perform incoming material audits, review supplier certifications, and participate in process improvement activities.

title: Industrial Engineer
description: Optimize production systems, workflows, and supply chains by applying quantitative methods, simulation, and lean principles to reduce waste and improve efficiency.

tasks.name: Process Analysis & Work Study
tasks.description: Conduct time-motion studies, value stream mapping, and process capability analyses to identify inefficiencies and quantify improvement opportunities.

tasks.name: Simulation & Systems Modeling
tasks.description: Build discrete-event simulation models of production lines and logistics networks to evaluate layout changes, staffing levels, and scheduling policies.

tasks.name: Lean Implementation & Kaizen Events
tasks.description: Facilitate kaizen workshops, implement 5S, SMED, and kanban systems; coach production teams on continuous improvement practices and standard work.

tasks.name: Capacity Planning & Scheduling
tasks.description: Develop production schedules, model capacity constraints, and perform demand-supply matching to optimize equipment utilization and on-time delivery.

title: CNC Machine Operator
description: Set up, operate, and monitor CNC milling machines, lathes, and machining centers to produce precision metal components according to engineering drawings and tolerances.

tasks.name: Machine Setup & Tooling
tasks.description: Install tooling, set work offsets, load G-code programs, configure cutting parameters, and verify setup with trial runs before production.

tasks.name: Production Run Monitoring
tasks.description: Monitor machine operation during production runs, watch for tool wear, chatter, or surface finish anomalies, and make minor in-cycle adjustments.

tasks.name: In-process Part Inspection
tasks.description: Measure machined features with micrometers, calipers, and CMM probes; compare to print tolerances and adjust offsets to correct drift.

tasks.name: G-code Program Editing & Optimization
tasks.description: Edit and optimize G-code programs to improve cycle time, surface finish, and tool life; troubleshoot program errors and coordinate with process engineers.

title: Procurement Analyst
description: Analyze defense procurement requirements, evaluate vendor proposals, ensure regulatory compliance with FAR/DFARS, and manage contract documentation for military acquisitions.

tasks.name: Vendor Proposal Evaluation
tasks.description: Review and score contractor proposals against technical and cost criteria, applying source selection procedures.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance Review
tasks.description: Ensure procurement actions comply with FAR, DFARS, and agency-specific regulations; document compliance determinations.

tasks.name: Contract Documentation & Reporting
tasks.description: Draft contract modifications, solicitations, and required reporting; maintain procurement records in government systems.

tasks.name: Market Research & Price Analysis
tasks.description: Conduct market surveys, analyze pricing trends, and determine fair and reasonable pricing for government acquisitions.

title: Naval Shipbuilder
description: Fabricate, assemble, and repair structural components of naval vessels including hull sections, decking, and bulkheads using welding, cutting, and heavy equipment.

tasks.name: Structural Fabrication & Welding
tasks.description: Cut, shape, and weld steel plates, frames, and structural components to precise specifications for ship hulls and superstructures.

tasks.name: Module & Block Assembly
tasks.description: Assemble large ship sections from prefabricated modules, coordinating fit-up and alignment with rigging and crane operations.

tasks.name: Quality Inspection & Blueprint Reading
tasks.description: Interpret engineering drawings and specifications; perform dimensional checks and quality inspections on completed work.

tasks.name: Safety Compliance & Tool Maintenance
tasks.description: Follow shipyard safety protocols, maintain welding equipment and tools, and participate in safety training and hazard identification.

title: Program Analyst
description: Analyze defense program performance, track budgets and schedules, prepare briefings and reports for program management offices, and identify risks and corrective actions.

tasks.name: Program Performance Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze earned value management data, schedule variances, and cost performance indices to assess program health.

tasks.name: Reporting & Briefing Preparation
tasks.description: Draft status reports, executive briefings, Congressional budget justifications, and program review packages.

tasks.name: Risk & Issue Management
tasks.description: Identify, assess, and track program risks; develop mitigation strategies and coordinate corrective actions with stakeholders.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Coordination
tasks.description: Facilitate working-group meetings, coordinate across government and contractor teams, and manage information flow among program participants.

title: Defense Systems Engineer
description: Design and integrate complex defense systems including weapons systems, C4ISR platforms, and autonomous vehicles; manage requirements, system architecture, and verification testing.

tasks.name: Requirements Analysis & Architecture
tasks.description: Elicit, decompose, and allocate system requirements across hardware, software, and human interfaces; develop system architecture concepts.

tasks.name: System Integration & Testing
tasks.description: Plan and execute integration tests across subsystems; analyze test data, identify failure modes, and resolve interface defects.

tasks.name: Trade Studies & Design Decisions
tasks.description: Conduct technical trade studies comparing alternative design approaches; present recommendations and support milestone decision reviews.

tasks.name: Safety & Reliability Analysis
tasks.description: Perform failure mode and effects analyses, hazard analyses, and reliability modeling; ensure compliance with safety certification standards.

title: Intelligence Analyst
description: Collect, analyze, and synthesize intelligence from multiple sources to produce actionable assessments; identify threats, patterns, and adversary intentions for national security decision-makers.

tasks.name: Multi-Source Data Collection & Triage
tasks.description: Ingest and prioritize intelligence from SIGINT, HUMINT, OSINT, and IMINT sources; assess source reliability and information credibility.

tasks.name: Pattern & Link Analysis
tasks.description: Identify patterns, associations, and anomalies in large datasets; map networks of actors, facilities, and activities.

tasks.name: Intelligence Assessment Production
tasks.description: Draft finished intelligence products including threat assessments, situation reports, and intelligence estimates for senior policymakers.

tasks.name: Leadership Briefing & Advising
tasks.description: Deliver oral and written intelligence briefings to commanders and policymakers; answer questions and provide real-time analytical support.

title: Nuclear Engineer
description: Design and analyze nuclear reactor systems, fuel cycles, and radiation shielding; develop safety analyses, support plant operations, and advance reactor technology for power generation or research.

tasks.name: Reactor Physics & Safety Analysis
tasks.description: Model neutron flux distributions, thermal-hydraulics, and transient behavior; perform deterministic and probabilistic safety analyses.

tasks.name: System Design & Development
tasks.description: Design reactor components, cooling systems, and containment structures; develop detailed engineering specifications and drawings.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Licensing
tasks.description: Prepare license applications, safety analysis reports, and responses to NRC requests; ensure compliance with 10 CFR regulations.

tasks.name: Plant Operations Support
tasks.description: Support plant operators during startup, shutdown, and maintenance; troubleshoot anomalies and provide technical guidance.

title: Climate Data Scientist
description: Analyze large-scale climate datasets from satellites, sensors, and models to identify trends, build predictive models, and support climate policy and adaptation planning.

tasks.name: Climate Model Development & Validation
tasks.description: Develop, tune, and validate statistical and machine learning models of climate systems; integrate outputs with physical simulation frameworks.

tasks.name: Data Pipeline & Processing
tasks.description: Build and maintain ETL pipelines for satellite, reanalysis, and sensor data; perform quality control and harmonization across data sources.

tasks.name: Statistical Analysis & Trend Detection
tasks.description: Apply time-series analysis, extreme-value statistics, and attribution methods to detect climate change signals and quantify uncertainty.

tasks.name: Research Communication & Policy Support
tasks.description: Translate findings into accessible reports, visualizations, and policy briefs; present results to government and NGO stakeholders.

title: Wildlife Conservation Biologist
description: Study wildlife populations, habitats, and ecosystems to inform conservation management; conduct field surveys, analyze population dynamics, and advise on land use and environmental policy.

tasks.name: Field Surveys & Data Collection
tasks.description: Conduct wildlife population surveys using transects, trapping, camera traps, and remote sensing; collect biological samples in the field.

tasks.name: Population Dynamics Analysis
tasks.description: Apply mark-recapture models, occupancy models, and survival analyses to estimate population size, trends, and viability.

tasks.name: Habitat Assessment & GIS Mapping
tasks.description: Evaluate habitat quality and connectivity; create GIS maps of species distributions, land cover, and habitat suitability models.

tasks.name: Conservation Planning & Policy Reporting
tasks.description: Develop species management plans, write environmental impact assessments, and advise regulatory agencies and landowners on conservation practices.

title: Environmental Engineer
description: Design systems to prevent, control, or remediate environmental hazards; conduct site assessments, develop remediation plans, and ensure regulatory compliance for industrial and government clients.

tasks.name: Environmental Site Assessment
tasks.description: Conduct Phase I/II site assessments; collect soil, water, and air samples; characterize contamination extent and risk pathways.

tasks.name: Remediation System Design
tasks.description: Design and optimize groundwater pump-and-treat systems, soil vapor extraction, and innovative remediation technologies for contaminated sites.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Reporting
tasks.description: Prepare RCRA, CERCLA, and Clean Water Act compliance reports; write permit applications and respond to agency inquiries.

tasks.name: Human Health & Ecological Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Quantify exposure pathways and toxicological risks; apply EPA risk assessment frameworks to determine cleanup levels and remedial goals.

title: Renewable Energy Technician
description: Install, maintain, and repair wind turbines and solar photovoltaic systems; perform electrical and mechanical inspections, troubleshoot faults, and ensure safe operation of renewable generation assets.

tasks.name: Equipment Installation & Commissioning
tasks.description: Install solar panels, inverters, mounting structures, and wind turbine components; commission systems and verify grid interconnection requirements.

tasks.name: Preventive & Corrective Maintenance
tasks.description: Perform scheduled inspections, lubrication, blade inspections, and electrical testing; diagnose and repair mechanical and electrical faults.

tasks.name: System Performance Monitoring
tasks.description: Monitor SCADA dashboards and performance data; identify underperforming assets and escalate anomalies to engineering teams.

tasks.name: Safety & Compliance Procedures
tasks.description: Follow OSHA and NFPA 70E electrical safety protocols; complete lockout/tagout procedures, work permits, and safety documentation.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense prescription medications, counsel patients on drug therapies, identify drug interactions, collaborate with physicians on medication management, and oversee pharmacy operations.

tasks.name: Prescription Verification & Dispensing
tasks.description: Review, verify, and process prescriptions; perform drug utilization review and check for contraindications, dosing errors, and interactions.

tasks.name: Patient Medication Counseling
tasks.description: Counsel patients on medication use, side effects, adherence strategies, and lifestyle modifications; address patient concerns and questions.

tasks.name: Medication Therapy Management
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive medication reviews for complex patients; optimize drug regimens, resolve drug therapy problems, and coordinate with care teams.

tasks.name: Pharmacy Operations & Regulatory Compliance
tasks.description: Manage inventory, supervise pharmacy technicians, maintain DEA schedule compliance, and ensure accreditation standards are met.

title: Nurse Practitioner
description: Provide advanced primary and specialty care including diagnosis, treatment, and disease management; prescribe medications, order and interpret diagnostic tests, and serve as a primary care provider.

tasks.name: Clinical Diagnosis & Physical Examination
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive history and physical examinations; formulate differential diagnoses and develop diagnostic workup plans.

tasks.name: Treatment Planning & Prescribing
tasks.description: Develop and implement individualized treatment plans; prescribe medications, therapies, and referrals; monitor treatment response.

tasks.name: Chronic Disease Management
tasks.description: Monitor and manage patients with diabetes, hypertension, heart failure, and other chronic conditions; adjust therapies and coordinate specialist referrals.

tasks.name: Clinical Documentation & Care Coordination
tasks.description: Document encounters in EHR, coordinate referrals and follow-ups, manage prior authorizations, and communicate with care team members.

title: Lawyers
description: Lawyers represent clients in criminal and civil litigation and other legal proceedings, draft legal documents, and advise clients on legal transactions and rights. They interpret laws, analyze case precedents, negotiate settlements, and advocate before courts and government agencies. The role demands deep legal expertise, strategic judgment, and strong interpersonal skills across a wide range of practice areas.

tasks.name: Legal Research and Case Analysis
tasks.description: Research statutes, case law, regulations, and legal precedents to assess the merits of a case and develop legal strategy. Synthesize complex multi-source legal information to advise clients and prepare arguments.

tasks.name: Drafting and Reviewing Legal Documents
tasks.description: Prepare, draft, and review legal instruments such as contracts, wills, deeds, pleadings, and briefs. Ensure accuracy, compliance with legal standards, and alignment with client objectives.

tasks.name: Client Counseling and Legal Advising
tasks.description: Advise clients on legal rights, obligations, risks, and strategies related to business transactions, disputes, or regulatory matters. Build trust-based relationships requiring nuanced judgment and empathy.

tasks.name: Courtroom Representation and Oral Advocacy
tasks.description: Represent clients before courts, tribunals, or government agencies through oral arguments, examination of witnesses, and presentation of evidence. Requires real-time adaptive judgment and persuasive communication.

tasks.name: Negotiation and Settlement
tasks.description: Negotiate with opposing counsel, parties, and mediators to resolve civil disputes, reach plea agreements, or finalize transactional terms. Requires strategic interpersonal skill, persuasion, and real-time judgment.

title: Paralegals and Legal Assistants
description: Paralegals and legal assistants support attorneys by researching legal precedent, drafting and organizing legal documents, and managing case files. They conduct factual investigations, communicate with clients and court personnel, and prepare materials for trials and hearings. The role is heavily document- and research-intensive, operating almost entirely in digital and office environments.

tasks.name: Drafting and Editing Legal Documents
tasks.description: Prepare, edit, and review legal documents including briefs, pleadings, contracts, wills, and correspondence. Organize and maintain documents in paper or electronic filing systems.

tasks.name: Legal Research and Case Investigation
tasks.description: Investigate facts and law of cases by searching statutes, case decisions, public records, and legal databases to determine causes of action and support case strategy. Gather and analyze legal articles, codes, and documents.

tasks.name: Trial and Hearing Preparation
tasks.description: Organize exhibits, prepare trial binders, file pleadings with court clerks, and coordinate logistics such as subpoena delivery and witness scheduling. Ensure all materials are accurate and submitted on time.

tasks.name: Client and Professional Communication
tasks.description: Meet with clients, attorneys, witnesses, and other professionals to discuss case details, gather information, and relay updates. Conduct telephone and written correspondence with courts, opposing counsel, and external parties.

tasks.name: Administrative and Case Management
tasks.description: Direct and coordinate law office activities, manage calendars and deadlines, maintain filing systems, and perform administrative tasks such as billing support and records management.

title: Arbitrators, Mediators, and Conciliators
description: Arbitrators, mediators, and conciliators facilitate negotiation and conflict resolution outside the court system through structured dialogue and legal analysis. They evaluate evidence, apply relevant laws and precedents, and guide disputing parties toward mutually acceptable agreements or binding decisions. The role demands deep interpersonal trust, legal expertise, and nuanced judgment.

tasks.name: Legal Research and Case Analysis
tasks.description: Research applicable laws, regulations, precedents, and evaluate documentary evidence to prepare for hearings and reach legally sound conclusions. Involves synthesizing complex multi-source legal information.

tasks.name: Drafting Written Opinions and Decisions
tasks.description: Prepare formal written opinions, rulings, and decisions that articulate legal reasoning, findings of fact, and conclusions. Requires precise legal writing and structured argumentation.

tasks.name: Mediation and Dispute Facilitation
tasks.description: Conduct hearings and mediation sessions, using interpersonal techniques to facilitate communication between disputants, clarify issues, and guide parties toward mutual agreement. Requires deep social perceptiveness and trust-building.

tasks.name: Evidence and Compliance Evaluation
tasks.description: Evaluate submitted documents, claims, and evidence for compliance with legal standards; rule on admissibility of evidence and procedural motions. Involves structured judgment against defined legal criteria.

tasks.name: Procedural and Case Management
tasks.description: Conduct initial meetings with disputants to outline processes, settle procedural matters such as fees and scheduling, and manage case logistics. Involves moderate routine coordination and communication.

title: Judges, Magistrate Judges, and Magistrates
description: Judges preside over legal proceedings in courts of law, arbitrating disputes, ruling on the admissibility of evidence, and administering justice in criminal and civil cases. They interpret and apply statutes, precedents, and constitutional principles to render decisions and write legal opinions. Their role demands deep legal expertise, impartiality, and high-stakes judgment under significant public accountability.

tasks.name: Legal Research and Opinion Writing
tasks.description: Judges research applicable statutes, case law, and legal precedents to write formal opinions and decisions on motions, appeals, and cases. This involves synthesizing complex multi-source legal information into authoritative written rulings.

tasks.name: Adjudication and Sentencing
tasks.description: Judges evaluate evidence, apply legal standards, and render binding verdicts or sentences in criminal and civil proceedings. This requires nuanced judgment about facts, credibility, proportionality, and statutory compliance under conditions of high public consequence.

tasks.name: Courtroom Proceedings Management
tasks.description: Judges preside over hearings, rule on evidentiary objections, instruct juries, and ensure procedural compliance throughout trials. This task is deeply interpersonal and situationally dynamic, requiring real-time judgment in a public forum.

tasks.name: Case Document and Pleading Review
tasks.description: Judges read and analyze pleadings, motions, briefs, and evidentiary submissions to ascertain facts, legal issues, and procedural posture before and during proceedings. This is a high-volume information-processing task with structured legal inputs.

tasks.name: Advisory Interaction with Counsel and Court Personnel
tasks.description: Judges advise attorneys, litigants, juries, and court staff on conduct, procedural issues, and legal standards, often in real-time during proceedings or in pre-trial conferences. This task is fundamentally interpersonal and authority-dependent.

title: Logisticians
description: Logisticians analyze and coordinate the logistical functions of a firm or organization, managing the entire life cycle of a product from acquisition through final disposal. They are responsible for optimizing supply chains, managing vendor relationships, and ensuring timely delivery of resources. In the transportation industry, they balance cost efficiency with service-level requirements across complex distribution networks.

tasks.name: Supply Chain Analysis and Optimization
tasks.description: Analyze logistics performance data, review benchmarks against service agreements, and redesign movement of goods to maximize value and minimize costs. Involves processing structured data from multiple systems to identify inefficiencies.

tasks.name: Customer and Stakeholder Relationship Management
tasks.description: Maintain and develop positive business relationships with key customer personnel, understand customer needs, and explain proposed logistics solutions through written proposals and oral presentations. Requires sustained interpersonal trust and negotiation.

tasks.name: Materials and Resource Allocation Direction
tasks.description: Direct the availability and allocation of materials, supplies, and finished products across the supply chain. Involves scheduling, tracking inventory levels, and making real-time decisions about resource distribution.

tasks.name: Subcontractor and Proposal Management
tasks.description: Manage subcontractor activities by reviewing proposals, developing performance specifications, and serving as liaison between subcontractors and the organization. Includes drafting documentation and estimates for logistics proposals.

tasks.name: Team Leadership and Operational Oversight
tasks.description: Direct team activities by establishing task priorities, scheduling and tracking work assignments, providing guidance, and overseeing facility and staffing needs. Involves hiring, training, and performance management of logistics personnel.

skills.name: AI Tool Oversight and Prompt Engineering

title: Heavy and Tractor-Trailer Truck Drivers
description: Heavy and tractor-trailer truck drivers operate large commercial vehicles with a GVW of at least 26,001 pounds to transport goods across local, regional, or national routes. They are responsible for vehicle inspection, cargo security, regulatory compliance, and maintaining accurate logs. The role requires a commercial driver's license and combines physical operation with administrative documentation duties.

tasks.name: Operating and Navigating the Vehicle
tasks.description: Drive a tractor-trailer combination over long or short distances, making real-time decisions about route, traffic, weather, and road conditions. Requires continuous physical control and situational awareness.

tasks.name: Pre/Post-Trip Inspection and Basic Maintenance
tasks.description: Inspect mechanical, safety, and emergency equipment before and after trips; perform minor maintenance tasks such as adding fluids, checking tires, and coupling/uncoupling trailers. Identifies defects and reports them per federal regulations.

tasks.name: Cargo Verification and Documentation
tasks.description: Check bills of lading, load documentation, and receipts for completeness and accuracy; inspect cargo to ensure it is properly secured and compliant with regulations. Obtain signatures and collect payments upon delivery.

tasks.name: Hours-of-Service and Regulatory Logging
tasks.description: Maintain accurate logs of working hours, vehicle service status, and repair records in compliance with applicable state and federal regulations (e.g., FMCSA ELD mandates). Report accidents, violations, and defects.

tasks.name: Communication with Dispatchers and Customers
tasks.description: Communicate with supervisors, dispatchers, and customers regarding delivery status, route changes, delays, and special instructions. Involves speaking, active listening, and occasional problem resolution.

skills.name: Operation and Control of Heavy Vehicles

title: Airline Pilots, Copilots, and Flight Engineers
description: Airline pilots operate fixed-wing aircraft on scheduled carrier routes, transporting passengers and cargo under strict federal regulations and safety protocols. They are responsible for pre-flight inspections, navigation, crew coordination, and emergency response. The role demands continuous real-time judgment, physical control of complex machinery, and high-stakes decision-making under time pressure.

tasks.name: Aircraft Operation and Navigation
tasks.description: Pilots start engines, operate flight controls, and navigate aircraft along planned routes using autopilot systems, flight management computers, and instrumentation. This is the core physical-cognitive task occupying the majority of flight time.

tasks.name: In-Flight Systems and Performance Monitoring
tasks.description: Pilots continuously monitor engine operation, fuel consumption, gauges, warning devices, and control panels to verify aircraft performance and detect anomalies. This involves interpreting rich structured sensor data in real time.

tasks.name: Emergency Response and Malfunction Management
tasks.description: Pilots respond to in-flight emergencies and malfunctions, applying trained procedures while exercising real-time judgment under extreme time pressure. This task is highly novel and safety-critical, requiring deep situational awareness and crew coordination.

tasks.name: Pre-Flight Inspection and Weight/Balance Verification
tasks.description: Pilots inspect aircraft for defects and malfunctions using standardized checklists and verify passenger, cargo, and fuel distributions to ensure weight and balance specifications are met. This is a structured, procedural task with physical on-site requirements.

tasks.name: Crew and Air Traffic Control Coordination
tasks.description: Pilots work as part of a flight team with crew members and communicate with air traffic control towers for clearances, arrival instructions, and situational updates via radio. This task is deeply interpersonal and safety-critical, requiring precise verbal communication and teamwork.

skills.name: Operation and Control of Aircraft Systems

title: Transportation, Storage, and Distribution Managers
description: Transportation, Storage, and Distribution Managers plan, direct, and coordinate the movement, storage, and distribution of goods and materials in compliance with organizational policies and government regulations. They oversee warehouse operations, vehicle fleets, and logistics systems while managing staff and collaborating across departments. Often called logistics managers, they balance cost efficiency, safety, and regulatory compliance in complex supply chain environments.

tasks.name: Supervise Warehouse and Distribution Staff
tasks.description: Direct and oversee workers engaged in receiving, storing, testing, and shipping products or materials, ensuring compliance with organizational standards and safety protocols. Involves real-time problem-solving, performance monitoring, and team coordination.

tasks.name: Analyze Logistics Costs and Efficiency
tasks.description: Evaluate all aspects of corporate logistics to identify the most cost-effective transportation modes, routing, and carrier options, including financial impact analysis of proposed changes. Synthesizes structured data from multiple systems to support strategic decisions.

tasks.name: Monitor Regulatory and Policy Compliance
tasks.description: Ensure staff and operations adhere to administrative policies, safety rules, union contracts, environmental policies, and government regulations. Involves developing, documenting, and enforcing standard and emergency operating procedures.

tasks.name: Cross-Departmental Logistics Integration
tasks.description: Collaborate with sales, order management, accounting, and shipping departments to integrate logistics with broader business systems and processes. Requires negotiation, relationship management, and translating operational needs into strategic alignment.

tasks.name: Inspect Facilities, Fleets, and Equipment
tasks.description: Physically inspect warehouses, vehicle fleets, and equipment to assess conditions and order necessary maintenance, repairs, or replacements. Also includes planning and implementing safety and security programs for warehouse operations.

title: Writers and Authors
description: Writers and authors originate and prepare written material including scripts, stories, advertisements, and promotional content across a wide range of media and industries. They research topics, craft narratives or persuasive copy, and collaborate with clients, editors, and creative teams to refine and deliver polished written work. The role demands strong command of language, audience awareness, and creative ideation.

tasks.name: Creative Writing and Content Drafting
tasks.description: Compose original written material including stories, scripts, articles, and promotional copy, adapting tone and style to suit the medium and audience. This is the core creative output of the occupation.

tasks.name: Research and Ideation
tasks.description: Gather factual information, review consumer surveys, advertising trends, and conduct interviews to inform written content and identify the most compelling angles or selling features. Synthesizes diverse sources into coherent creative direction.

tasks.name: Client Consultation and Presentation
tasks.description: Present drafts and creative concepts to clients, discuss advertising themes and methods, and incorporate feedback to align written work with client goals and brand identity. Requires persuasion, active listening, and interpersonal trust.

tasks.name: Advertising Campaign Development
tasks.description: Develop overarching advertising campaigns in collaboration with creative directors and art directors, determining messaging strategy, tone, and channel-specific adaptations. Involves high-level creative and strategic decision-making.

tasks.name: Editing, Revision, and Quality Review
tasks.description: Review and refine drafts for clarity, consistency, grammar, and alignment with brand or editorial standards, incorporating feedback from editors, clients, or collaborators. Ensures final output meets professional quality benchmarks.

title: Graphic Designers
description: Graphic designers create visual concepts to communicate ideas that inspire, inform, or captivate consumers. They develop the overall layout and production design for applications such as advertisements, brochures, magazines, and corporate reports. Using a combination of artistic skill and digital tools, they translate client needs into compelling visual solutions.

tasks.name: Creative Concept & Layout Design
tasks.description: Develop original design concepts, sample layouts, and visual hierarchies based on client briefs and aesthetic principles. Involves ideation, composition decisions, and iterative refinement.

tasks.name: Digital Asset Production & File Preparation
tasks.description: Use design software to generate images, prepare digital files for print or web, and produce final deliverables such as logos, illustrations, and packaged print-ready files.

tasks.name: Client Consultation & Requirements Gathering
tasks.description: Confer with clients or supervisors to understand project goals, target audience, brand guidelines, and design constraints. Translate qualitative feedback into actionable design direction.

tasks.name: Target Audience & Market Research
tasks.description: Research the demographics, preferences, and behaviors of target audiences to inform design decisions. Synthesize competitive landscape and trend data to ensure relevance and effectiveness.

tasks.name: Design Review & Quality Iteration
tasks.description: Review final layouts for accuracy, consistency, and aesthetic quality; incorporate feedback from clients and stakeholders through iterative revision cycles.

title: Film and Video Editors
description: Film and video editors assemble raw footage into polished final products by selecting, trimming, and sequencing shots according to director or producer instructions. They integrate music, dialogue, sound effects, and visual effects to create cohesive narratives. The role demands both technical proficiency with editing software and strong aesthetic judgment.

tasks.name: Organize and Assemble Raw Footage
tasks.description: Review, organize, and string together raw footage into a continuous, coherent sequence following scripts and director/producer instructions. Involves ingesting media, logging clips, and building rough cuts.

tasks.name: Creative Editing and Shot Selection
tasks.description: Select the most effective shots from each scene, cut sequences to different angles, and craft seamless transitions to maximize narrative impact and emotional resonance. Requires strong aesthetic and storytelling judgment.

tasks.name: Audio-Visual Integration and Sound Editing
tasks.description: Edit and synchronize music, dialogue, and sound effects with visual footage, manipulating audio tracks and collaborating with sound, music, and special effects departments to produce a unified final product.

tasks.name: Technical Equipment Operation and Quality Review
tasks.description: Set up and operate editing systems, electronic titling, video switching, and digital effects units; verify key numbers and time codes; review assembled edits on monitors to identify and correct errors.

tasks.name: Collaboration with Directors and Producers
tasks.description: Communicate with directors, producers, and cross-functional creative teams to interpret creative vision, incorporate feedback, and align editorial decisions with the overall production goals.

skills.name: AI-Assisted Editing Tool Prompting and Curation
Color Grading and Visual Effects Coordination

title: News Analysts, Reporters, and Journalists
description: News analysts, reporters, and journalists gather, investigate, and communicate news stories across print, broadcast, and digital media. They conduct interviews, research backgrounds, and synthesize information to produce accurate and compelling narratives for public audiences. The role demands strong interpersonal skills, creative judgment, and the ability to work under significant time pressure.

tasks.name: Story Research and Investigation
tasks.description: Reporters gather background information, evaluate leads, and conduct interviews to develop accurate and complete news stories. This involves multi-source synthesis, source cultivation, and on-the-ground observation.

tasks.name: Writing, Scripting, and Commentary
tasks.description: Journalists write news articles, opinion columns, broadcast scripts, and digital content using computers. This task requires clear prose, narrative structure, and editorial judgment about framing and emphasis.

tasks.name: News Analysis and Interpretation
tasks.description: Analysts evaluate the significance of local, national, and international events, interpreting complex information for public audiences. This involves critical thinking, contextual judgment, and editorial prioritization.

tasks.name: On-Air Presenting and Broadcasting
tasks.description: Broadcast journalists anchor news programs, introduce segments, and present live or recorded stories to television or radio audiences. This requires real-time performance, vocal delivery, and audience engagement.

tasks.name: Source Cultivation and Interview Coordination
tasks.description: Journalists arrange and conduct interviews, build relationships with sources, and maintain networks of contacts to access exclusive or timely information. This task is deeply interpersonal and trust-dependent.

title: Electricians
description: Electricians install, maintain, and repair electrical wiring, equipment, and fixtures in residential, commercial, and industrial settings. They read blueprints, ensure compliance with electrical codes, and troubleshoot faults using specialized testing equipment. The role demands significant physical dexterity, on-site presence, and adherence to safety regulations.

tasks.name: Physical Installation of Wiring and Conduit
tasks.description: Run conduit, pull wire, connect circuits, and mount fixtures on-site using hand and power tools, often working from ladders or scaffolding in confined or hazardous spaces.

tasks.name: Blueprint Reading and Job Planning
tasks.description: Interpret architectural and electrical blueprints, plan wiring layouts, and ensure designs conform to local building and safety codes before and during installation.

tasks.name: Testing and Troubleshooting Electrical Systems
tasks.description: Use ohmmeters, voltmeters, oscilloscopes, and other diagnostic tools to test circuits, identify faults, and verify system safety and compatibility.

tasks.name: Coordinating and Supervising Workers
tasks.description: Direct apprentices and crew members, communicate job requirements with supervisors and clients, and coordinate work schedules and task assignments on job sites.

tasks.name: Code Compliance and Documentation
tasks.description: Maintain licensure, document completed work, file inspection reports, and ensure all installations meet national and local electrical codes and safety standards.

title: Plumbers, Pipefitters, and Steamfitters
description: Plumbers, pipefitters, and steamfitters assemble, install, alter, and repair pipelines and pipe systems that carry water, steam, air, or other liquids and gases. They work across residential, commercial, and industrial settings, reading blueprints, selecting materials, and ensuring systems meet building codes and safety standards. The occupation requires significant physical dexterity, on-site presence, and applied problem-solving in variable environments.

tasks.name: Install and Assemble Pipe Systems
tasks.description: Cut, thread, bend, and join pipe sections using a variety of tools and joining methods including welding, soldering, and mechanical fittings. Requires precise physical manipulation in confined or elevated spaces.

tasks.name: Review Blueprints and Plan Pipe Layout
tasks.description: Interpret engineering drawings, building codes, and specifications to determine pipe routing, sizing, and installation procedures. Lay out full-scale drawings and plan system configurations before physical work begins.

tasks.name: Diagnose and Repair Pipe System Failures
tasks.description: Identify leaks, blockages, pressure failures, or mechanical faults by inspecting systems, testing with water or air pressure, and using diagnostic judgment. Determine and execute appropriate repair strategies.

tasks.name: Select Materials and Coordinate with Supervisors
tasks.description: Choose appropriate pipe sizes, types, fittings, and supports based on system specifications and site conditions. Communicate progress, issues, and material needs to supervisors, contractors, and team members.

tasks.name: Ensure Safety and Code Compliance
tasks.description: Shut off utilities, use protective equipment, and verify that all installations meet local building codes and safety regulations. Conduct inspections and document completed work for compliance records.

title: Heating, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration Mechanics and Installers
description: HVAC/R technicians install, maintain, and repair heating, cooling, and refrigeration systems in residential and commercial settings. The work is heavily hands-on, requiring physical presence at job sites to diagnose malfunctions, replace components, and verify system performance. Technicians must interpret technical blueprints, apply electrical and mechanical knowledge, and interact directly with customers to resolve issues.

tasks.name: Diagnose and Troubleshoot System Malfunctions
tasks.description: Inspect HVAC/R systems, test electrical circuits and components, and discuss symptoms with users to isolate faults and determine corrective action. Requires integrating sensory observation, test equipment readings, and technical knowledge.

tasks.name: Install and Connect HVAC/R Equipment
tasks.description: Physically install heating, cooling, and refrigeration units by connecting them to fuel, water, refrigerant, and electrical sources per blueprints and manufacturer specifications. Requires dexterous on-site manipulation of tools, pipes, and wiring.

tasks.name: Repair or Replace Defective Components and Wiring
tasks.description: Remove and replace faulty parts such as compressors, motors, valves, and wiring to restore system functionality. Work is physically demanding and site-specific, requiring hands-on manipulation in confined or elevated spaces.

tasks.name: Ensure Compliance and Document Work
tasks.description: Review blueprints and manufacturer specifications, verify installations meet code and safety standards, and record maintenance or repair activities. Involves reading technical documents and producing service reports.

tasks.name: Customer Communication and Preventive Maintenance Recommendations
tasks.description: Discuss system performance and malfunctions with building occupants or facility managers, and recommend preventive maintenance procedures to extend equipment life. Requires active listening and clear explanation of technical issues.

title: Carpenters
description: Carpenters construct, erect, install, and repair structures and fixtures made of wood and comparable materials, including building frameworks, floors, windows, and door frames. They work from blueprints and specifications to measure, cut, shape, and assemble materials using hand and power tools. The occupation is predominantly physical and on-site, requiring dexterous manipulation of materials in varied construction environments.

tasks.name: Blueprint Reading and Project Layout
tasks.description: Study blueprints, sketches, or building plans to determine dimensions, materials, and project layout. Translate specifications into actionable measurements and sequencing on the job site.

tasks.name: Measuring, Marking, and Cutting Materials
tasks.description: Measure and mark cutting lines on wood and comparable materials using rulers, chalk lines, and marking gauges, then cut and shape materials to specified dimensions using hand tools, machines, or power saws.

tasks.name: Assembling and Fastening Structural Frameworks
tasks.description: Assemble and fasten materials to construct frameworks, partitions, joists, rafters, and other structural elements using hand tools, nails, screws, dowels, and adhesives. Verify structural trueness using plumb bobs and levels.

tasks.name: Inspection and Quality Verification
tasks.description: Inspect completed structures, materials, and installed fixtures to detect damage, misalignment, or defects. Ensure work meets safety regulations, building codes, and project specifications.

tasks.name: Documentation and Progress Reporting
tasks.description: Maintain records of work performed, document actions taken, and prepare written progress reports for supervisors or project managers. Track materials used and flag issues encountered on site.

title: Firefighters
description: Firefighters control and extinguish fires and respond to emergency situations where life, property, or the environment is at risk. Their duties span fire suppression, emergency medical response, hazardous material incidents, search and rescue, and disaster assistance. The role demands high physical fitness, rapid decision-making under extreme conditions, and close coordination with team members and the public.

tasks.name: Fire Suppression and Rescue Operations
tasks.description: Respond to fire alarms, enter burning structures, operate hoses and equipment, and rescue survivors from hazardous environments. Requires real-time physical judgment under rapidly changing, life-threatening conditions.

tasks.name: Situational Assessment and Radio Communication
tasks.description: Assess fire conditions, identify hazards, and report status to command using two-way radios to coordinate tactical response. Involves rapid synthesis of environmental cues and structured reporting under pressure.

tasks.name: Equipment Inspection and Maintenance
tasks.description: Inspect, test, and maintain firefighting vehicles, tools, breathing apparatus, and protective gear to ensure operational readiness. Follows structured checklists but requires hands-on physical verification.

tasks.name: Incident Documentation and Reporting
tasks.description: Document fire incidents, emergency responses, and inspection findings in structured reports for administrative, legal, and analytical purposes. Involves data entry, narrative writing, and records management.

tasks.name: Public Safety Education and Community Engagement
tasks.description: Conduct fire prevention inspections, deliver safety education programs, and engage with the public to reduce fire risk and build community trust. Requires interpersonal communication and relationship-building.

title: Police and Sheriff's Patrol Officers
description: Police and sheriff's patrol officers maintain public order and safety by enforcing local, state, and federal laws. They patrol assigned areas, respond to emergencies, investigate crimes, apprehend suspects, and document incidents. The role demands constant real-time judgment, physical presence, and deep interpersonal engagement with the public.

tasks.name: Patrol, Identify, and Apprehend Suspects
tasks.description: Officers patrol assigned areas, monitor for suspicious activity, pursue, and arrest suspects and perpetrators of criminal acts. This requires real-time situational awareness, physical presence, and split-second judgment.

tasks.name: Investigate Crimes and Suspicious Activities
tasks.description: Officers review facts of incidents, investigate illegal or suspicious activities, and determine whether criminal statutes were violated. This involves gathering evidence, interviewing witnesses, and applying legal knowledge.

tasks.name: Document Incidents and Prepare Reports
tasks.description: Officers record facts and prepare written reports documenting incidents, arrests, and activities for legal and administrative purposes. Accuracy and completeness are critical for court proceedings and departmental records.

tasks.name: Public Interaction, Conflict Resolution, and Community Relations
tasks.description: Officers engage directly with the public to resolve conflicts, respond to complaints, render first aid, and promote community relations. This requires high emotional intelligence, negotiation skills, and trust-building.

tasks.name: Testify in Court and Present Evidence
tasks.description: Officers testify in criminal and traffic court cases, presenting evidence and acting as witnesses. This requires precise recall, legal knowledge, and credible oral communication under cross-examination.

title: Physical Therapists
description: Physical therapists assess, plan, and implement individualized rehabilitative programs to improve patient mobility, relieve pain, and restore physical functioning following disease or injury. They work directly with patients through hands-on manual techniques, therapeutic exercises, and patient education. The role demands deep clinical judgment, interpersonal trust, and physical presence at the point of care.

tasks.name: Initial Patient Evaluation and Diagnosis
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive physical examinations, collect and interpret clinical data, and establish a diagnosis and treatment plan prior to intervention. Requires integrating subjective history, objective measurements, and clinical reasoning.

tasks.name: Hands-On Manual Therapy and Exercise Administration
tasks.description: Administer manual exercises, massage, traction, and therapeutic modalities directly to patients to relieve pain, increase strength, and restore function. Requires physical dexterity, tactile feedback, and real-time patient response monitoring.

tasks.name: Treatment Progress Monitoring and Plan Adjustment
tasks.description: Evaluate patient response to treatment at various stages, interpret outcome measures, and modify the intervention program to maximize therapeutic benefit. Involves ongoing clinical reasoning and adaptive decision-making.

tasks.name: Patient and Family Education
tasks.description: Instruct patients and their families in home exercise programs, activity modifications, and self-management strategies to reinforce clinical gains outside the clinic. Requires clear communication, empathy, and tailoring of information to individual comprehension levels.

tasks.name: Clinical Documentation and Interdisciplinary Care Coordination
tasks.description: Record patient evaluations, treatment notes, progress reports, and outcomes in electronic health records, and confer with physicians and other healthcare providers to coordinate care. Involves structured data entry, report generation, and professional communication.

title: Nursing Assistants
description: Nursing assistants provide basic care and support to patients in health or nursing facilities under the supervision of licensed nursing staff. Their duties include assisting with daily living activities such as bathing, dressing, feeding, and ambulation, as well as monitoring and documenting patient health status. The role is highly physical and interpersonal, requiring close, continuous contact with patients.

tasks.name: Direct Physical Patient Care
tasks.description: Assist patients with daily living activities including bathing, dressing, toileting, repositioning, and ambulation. Requires hands-on physical presence and dexterous manipulation in close proximity to patients.

tasks.name: Patient Monitoring and Observation
tasks.description: Observe patients for symptoms, changes in condition, or signs requiring medical attention such as wounds, behavioral changes, or abnormal outputs. Respond to call signals and assess immediate patient needs.

tasks.name: Documentation and Reporting
tasks.description: Measure and record food and liquid intake, urinary and fecal output, and document observations of patient behavior, complaints, and physical symptoms for nursing staff review.

tasks.name: Dietary and Medication Support
tasks.description: Review and apply patients' dietary restrictions, food allergies, and preferences to ensure appropriate nutrition. Remind patients to take medications or nutritional supplements as scheduled.

tasks.name: Interpersonal Communication and Emotional Support
tasks.description: Establish and maintain supportive relationships with patients and their families, communicating needs and concerns to nursing staff and providing emotional reassurance during care activities.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor networks and systems for security threats, investigate incidents, conduct vulnerability assessments, and implement controls to protect organizational data and infrastructure.

tasks.name: Threat Monitoring & Detection
tasks.description: Continuously analyze security event logs, SIEM alerts, and network traffic to identify anomalies and potential intrusions.

tasks.name: Incident Response
tasks.description: Triage and investigate security incidents, coordinate containment actions, conduct forensic analysis, and document findings for remediation.

tasks.name: Vulnerability Assessment
tasks.description: Scan systems for misconfigurations and known CVEs, prioritize remediation efforts, and verify patch effectiveness.

tasks.name: Security Reporting & Documentation
tasks.description: Produce threat intelligence reports, risk assessments, and executive summaries to communicate security posture to stakeholders.

title: UX Designer
description: Research user needs, create wireframes and prototypes, conduct usability testing, and collaborate with engineers to deliver intuitive digital products.

tasks.name: User Research
tasks.description: Plan and conduct interviews, surveys, and contextual inquiries to understand user behaviors, needs, and pain points.

tasks.name: Prototyping & Wireframing
tasks.description: Create low- and high-fidelity wireframes, interactive prototypes, and user flows to communicate design concepts.

tasks.name: Usability Testing
tasks.description: Facilitate moderated and unmoderated usability sessions, analyze findings, and present recommendations to product teams.

tasks.name: Design Systems & Documentation
tasks.description: Maintain component libraries, document interaction patterns, and ensure consistency across product surfaces.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure as code, monitor system reliability, and bridge development and operations teams.

tasks.name: CI/CD Pipeline Management
tasks.description: Design, build, and maintain automated build, test, and deployment pipelines to accelerate software delivery.

tasks.name: Infrastructure as Code
tasks.description: Provision and manage cloud resources using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools; enforce reproducible infrastructure configurations.

tasks.name: System Monitoring & Incident Response
tasks.description: Set up observability stacks, triage production alerts, diagnose failures, and coordinate remediation with engineering teams.

tasks.name: Team Collaboration & Documentation
tasks.description: Facilitate cross-team communication, document runbooks and architecture decisions, and mentor developers on operational practices.

title: ML / AI Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models; build data pipelines; and integrate AI capabilities into production systems.

tasks.name: Model Development & Training
tasks.description: Formulate ML problems, select architectures, train and tune models using large datasets, and iterate based on evaluation metrics.

tasks.name: Data Pipeline Engineering
tasks.description: Build and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines, feature stores, and data quality checks to feed ML training and inference workloads.

tasks.name: Model Evaluation & Monitoring
tasks.description: Design evaluation frameworks, track production model performance, detect drift, and coordinate retraining cycles.

tasks.name: Research & Experimentation
tasks.description: Survey literature, prototype novel approaches, run ablation studies, and communicate findings to engineering and product teams.

title: Surgeon
description: Perform complex operative procedures to treat diseases and injuries, plan surgical approaches, and manage pre- and post-operative care in collaboration with multidisciplinary teams.

tasks.name: Surgical Procedure Execution
tasks.description: Perform open, laparoscopic, and robotic surgeries requiring precise manual dexterity, intraoperative decision-making, and real-time anatomical navigation.

tasks.name: Pre-operative Planning
tasks.description: Review imaging and patient history, determine surgical approach, order pre-op tests, and obtain informed consent.

tasks.name: Patient Consultation
tasks.description: Discuss diagnoses, treatment options, risks, and expected outcomes with patients and families to guide shared decision-making.

tasks.name: Post-operative Care & Rounds
tasks.description: Monitor wound healing, manage pain and complications, adjust post-op orders, and coordinate discharge planning.

title: Mental Health Counselor
description: Provide individual, group, and family therapy to help clients manage mental health conditions, behavioral challenges, and life transitions through evidence-based therapeutic approaches.

tasks.name: Individual Therapy Sessions
tasks.description: Conduct structured psychotherapy using CBT, DBT, or other modalities to address depression, anxiety, trauma, and other mental health concerns.

tasks.name: Patient Assessment & Diagnosis
tasks.description: Administer standardized assessments, gather clinical history, and formulate DSM diagnoses to guide treatment planning.

tasks.name: Treatment Planning
tasks.description: Develop individualized treatment plans with measurable goals, select therapeutic modalities, and adjust plans based on progress.

tasks.name: Case Notes & Documentation
tasks.description: Write progress notes, treatment summaries, and insurance documentation; maintain compliance with HIPAA and licensing requirements.

title: Dental Hygienist
description: Perform oral health assessments, clean teeth, take radiographs, and educate patients on preventive dental care under the supervision of dentists.

tasks.name: Teeth Cleaning & Prophylaxis
tasks.description: Remove calculus, plaque, and stains using manual and ultrasonic instruments; perform fluoride treatments and sealant applications.

tasks.name: Oral Health Assessment & Radiographs
tasks.description: Examine gum tissue, chart periodontal measurements, take and interpret dental X-rays, and screen for oral diseases.

tasks.name: Patient Education
tasks.description: Instruct patients on brushing, flossing, diet, and tobacco cessation; tailor recommendations to individual oral health status.

tasks.name: Records & Administrative Tasks
tasks.description: Update patient charts, document procedures, verify insurance, and schedule follow-up appointments.

title: Actuary
description: Apply statistical modeling, probability theory, and financial mathematics to assess risk, price insurance products, and advise on reserves and capital requirements.

tasks.name: Statistical Risk Modeling
tasks.description: Build and validate stochastic models to quantify mortality, morbidity, catastrophe, and financial risks for pricing and reserving.

tasks.name: Regulatory Reporting
tasks.description: Prepare actuarial certifications, statutory filings, and reserve analyses in compliance with state and federal insurance regulations.

tasks.name: Client & Business Communication
tasks.description: Translate complex actuarial results into actionable recommendations for executives, underwriters, and external clients.

tasks.name: Pricing Model Development
tasks.description: Design and refine rate structures for insurance products using predictive analytics, GLMs, and competitive benchmarking.

title: Portfolio Manager
description: Construct and manage investment portfolios to meet client objectives, perform security analysis, and communicate performance attribution to institutional and retail clients.

tasks.name: Investment Analysis & Security Selection
tasks.description: Evaluate equities, fixed income, and alternative assets using fundamental, quantitative, and macro analysis to identify alpha opportunities.

tasks.name: Portfolio Construction & Rebalancing
tasks.description: Optimize asset allocation, manage factor exposures, execute rebalancing trades, and monitor portfolio drift against benchmarks.

tasks.name: Client Reporting & Communication
tasks.description: Prepare quarterly performance reports, lead investment committee presentations, and respond to client inquiries on strategy and positioning.

tasks.name: Risk Management & Compliance
tasks.description: Monitor portfolio risk metrics, ensure adherence to investment guidelines and regulatory requirements, and document compliance controls.

title: Compliance Officer
description: Monitor regulatory requirements, develop internal policies, conduct audits, and train staff to ensure organizational adherence to legal and industry standards.

tasks.name: Regulatory Monitoring & Research
tasks.description: Track changes to laws, regulations, and agency guidance; assess impact on business operations and identify compliance gaps.

tasks.name: Policy Development & Review
tasks.description: Draft, update, and review compliance policies, procedures, and controls to align with regulatory expectations and business risk appetite.

tasks.name: Compliance Auditing
tasks.description: Conduct risk-based internal audits, document findings, assess control effectiveness, and present remediation recommendations.

tasks.name: Training & Internal Communication
tasks.description: Design and deliver compliance training programs, respond to employee inquiries, and foster a culture of ethical conduct.

title: School Counselor
description: Support students' academic, social-emotional, and career development through individual counseling, group programs, college advising, and crisis intervention in K-12 settings.

tasks.name: Student Counseling Sessions
tasks.description: Conduct individual and small-group counseling to address academic stress, family issues, peer conflicts, and mental health concerns.

tasks.name: College & Career Advising
