tasks.description: Guide students through college searches, application essays, financial aid, and career exploration aligned with their interests and strengths.

tasks.name: Crisis Intervention
tasks.description: Respond to mental health emergencies, assess risk, coordinate with parents and community resources, and implement safety plans.

tasks.name: Administrative Records & Reporting
tasks.description: Maintain student records, prepare graduation audits, generate data reports for administrators, and fulfill state reporting requirements.

title: Social Media Manager
description: Plan, create, and publish content across social platforms, analyze performance metrics, manage community engagement, and align social strategy with brand and marketing goals.

tasks.name: Content Creation & Copywriting
tasks.description: Write posts, scripts, and captions; produce or brief creative assets; adapt brand voice for each platform's format and audience.

tasks.name: Analytics & Performance Reporting
tasks.description: Track reach, engagement, and conversion KPIs; produce dashboards and reports; derive insights to optimize content calendar.

tasks.name: Community Management & Engagement
tasks.description: Respond to comments and DMs, moderate discussions, manage brand reputation, and nurture audience relationships.

tasks.name: Campaign Planning & Strategy
tasks.description: Develop editorial calendars, brief paid social campaigns, coordinate with cross-functional teams, and align initiatives with business objectives.

title: Robotics Technician
description: Program, install, maintain, and troubleshoot industrial robots and automated systems on the factory floor to maximize uptime and production efficiency.

tasks.name: Robot Programming & Configuration
tasks.description: Write and modify robot programs, configure end-effectors, and commission new automation cells to meet production specifications.

tasks.name: Maintenance & Troubleshooting
tasks.description: Diagnose mechanical, electrical, and software faults; perform preventive maintenance; and restore automated systems to operational status.

tasks.name: Process Optimization
tasks.description: Analyze cycle times, identify bottlenecks, and implement improvements to increase throughput and reduce waste in automated production lines.

tasks.name: Safety Compliance & Documentation
tasks.description: Maintain safety protocols for robot work cells, conduct risk assessments, and document maintenance logs and modification records.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Analyze supply chain data to optimize inventory levels, forecast demand, evaluate suppliers, and identify cost-reduction opportunities across sourcing, logistics, and distribution.

tasks.name: Demand Forecasting & Planning
tasks.description: Build statistical demand models, incorporate market signals, and collaborate with sales and operations teams to produce accurate demand plans.

tasks.name: Supplier Evaluation & Sourcing
tasks.description: Assess supplier capabilities, conduct RFPs, negotiate terms, and monitor vendor performance against cost, quality, and delivery KPIs.

tasks.name: Performance Monitoring & Reporting
tasks.description: Build supply chain dashboards, track on-time delivery, inventory turns, and total cost metrics, and present findings to leadership.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Communication
tasks.description: Coordinate with procurement, logistics, manufacturing, and finance teams; escalate supply disruptions and align on mitigation actions.

title: Emergency Medical Technician (EMT)
description: Respond to 911 calls, assess and stabilize patients at emergency scenes, provide pre-hospital treatment, and transport patients to appropriate medical facilities.

tasks.name: Emergency Scene Assessment & Triage
tasks.description: Rapidly evaluate scene safety, assess patient condition using the ABCDE framework, and prioritize care for multiple casualties.

tasks.name: Patient Treatment & Stabilization
tasks.description: Administer CPR, manage airways, control bleeding, immobilize fractures, and deliver medications within EMT scope of practice.

tasks.name: Medical Communication & Documentation
tasks.description: Radio patient status to receiving hospitals, complete electronic patient care reports, and transfer care with verbal handoffs.

tasks.name: Equipment Maintenance & Readiness
tasks.description: Check, clean, and restock the ambulance and medical supplies at the start of each shift and after every call.

title: Customer Service Representative
description: Handle inbound customer inquiries, resolve complaints, process orders and returns, and provide product information across phone, chat, and email channels.

tasks.name: Customer Inquiry Handling
tasks.description: Answer product, order, billing, and policy questions through phone, email, and chat; navigate knowledge bases to provide accurate information.

tasks.name: Complaint Resolution
tasks.description: De-escalate upset customers, investigate service failures, apply remedies within policy guidelines, and follow up to confirm satisfaction.

tasks.name: Data Entry & Order Processing
tasks.description: Update customer accounts, log interactions in CRM systems, process orders and returns, and maintain accurate transaction records.

tasks.name: Product Knowledge & Upselling
tasks.description: Recommend complementary products, explain features and promotions, and identify cross-sell opportunities during service interactions.

title: Chef / Head Cook
description: Direct kitchen operations, develop menus, prepare and oversee food production, manage kitchen staff, and ensure food safety and quality standards.

tasks.name: Food Preparation & Cooking
tasks.description: Execute complex cooking techniques across multiple stations; maintain consistency in taste, presentation, and portioning during service.

tasks.name: Menu Development
tasks.description: Research culinary trends, design seasonal menus, cost recipes, and balance nutritional variety with operational feasibility.

tasks.name: Kitchen & Staff Management
tasks.description: Schedule shifts, train line cooks, delegate tasks during service, and maintain a productive and safe kitchen environment.

tasks.name: Inventory & Cost Control
tasks.description: Order food and supplies, track waste, analyze food cost percentages, and implement processes to hit budget targets.

title: Retail Store Manager
description: Oversee daily store operations, manage staff schedules, drive sales performance, maintain inventory accuracy, and ensure exceptional customer experiences.

tasks.name: Sales & Operations Management
tasks.description: Monitor daily sales metrics, adjust floor plans and promotions, and make operational decisions to meet revenue and shrink targets.

tasks.name: Staff Scheduling & Supervision
tasks.description: Build weekly schedules, coach associates, conduct performance reviews, and handle HR tasks such as hiring and disciplinary actions.

tasks.name: Inventory & Merchandising
tasks.description: Manage stock levels, execute planograms, process shipments, conduct cycle counts, and reduce out-of-stock incidents.

tasks.name: Customer Relations & Escalations
tasks.description: Handle escalated complaints, resolve complex customer issues, and build loyalty through exceptional service standards.

title: Real Estate Agent
description: Represent buyers and sellers in residential and commercial real estate transactions, conduct market analysis, market properties, negotiate contracts, and guide clients through closing.

tasks.name: Property Showings & Client Interaction
tasks.description: Schedule and conduct property tours, understand client preferences, provide neighborhood context, and advise on fit between properties and buyer needs.

tasks.name: Market Analysis & Pricing
tasks.description: Prepare comparative market analyses using MLS data, recent sales, and local trends to advise sellers on listing price and buyers on offer strategy.

tasks.name: Listing & Marketing Properties
tasks.description: Create property listings with photography, virtual tours, and compelling descriptions; execute digital and social marketing campaigns.

tasks.name: Contract Negotiation & Paperwork
tasks.description: Draft and negotiate purchase agreements, manage contingencies and disclosures, and coordinate with lenders and title companies to close transactions.

title: Property Manager
description: Oversee residential or commercial rental properties, manage tenant relationships, coordinate maintenance, and ensure properties meet financial performance targets.

tasks.name: Tenant Relations & Leasing
tasks.description: Screen applicants, negotiate lease terms, resolve tenant issues, process renewals, and manage move-in and move-out procedures.

tasks.name: Maintenance Coordination
tasks.description: Respond to repair requests, schedule and oversee vendors, conduct property inspections, and manage preventive maintenance programs.

tasks.name: Financial Reporting & Budgeting
tasks.description: Prepare monthly owner reports, track income and expenses against budget, manage security deposits, and optimize NOI.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Inspections
tasks.description: Ensure adherence to fair housing laws, local codes, and safety requirements; prepare for and respond to regulatory inspections.

title: Real Estate Appraiser
description: Estimate the market value of residential and commercial properties through physical inspection, comparable sales analysis, and formal appraisal reporting for lending and legal purposes.

tasks.name: Property Inspection & Data Collection
tasks.description: Physically inspect properties, measure square footage, note condition and features, photograph assets, and document site characteristics.

tasks.name: Comparable Market Analysis
tasks.description: Research and select comparable sales, adjust for differences in size, condition, and location, and reconcile value indicators into a final opinion.

tasks.name: Appraisal Report Writing
tasks.description: Prepare USPAP-compliant appraisal reports including market analysis, methodology, adjustments, and value conclusion narrative.

tasks.name: Client & Lender Communication
tasks.description: Respond to review requests and questions from lenders, attorneys, and clients; defend value conclusions when challenged.

title: Farm Manager
description: Direct the operations of crop and livestock farms, oversee planting, harvesting, and animal care, manage farmhands, and handle financial planning and regulatory compliance.

tasks.name: Crop & Livestock Planning
tasks.description: Select crop varieties and livestock breeds, plan planting and harvest schedules, and make agronomy decisions based on soil data and market conditions.

tasks.name: Field Operations & Equipment Management
tasks.description: Operate and supervise use of tractors, combines, and irrigation systems; oversee planting, cultivation, and harvest activities.

tasks.name: Financial & Record Management
tasks.description: Prepare budgets, track income and expenses, apply for USDA programs, and maintain records for tax and regulatory compliance.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Commodity Marketing
tasks.description: Navigate food safety regulations, environmental permits, and labor rules; sell commodities through spot markets, cooperatives, or contract arrangements.

title: Precision Agriculture Specialist
description: Apply GPS, drone, and sensor technologies to optimize crop inputs, map yield variability, and provide data-driven recommendations that improve farm productivity and sustainability.

tasks.name: Sensor Data Analysis & Mapping
tasks.description: Process yield monitor data, NDVI imagery, and soil sensor readings using GIS software to create variability maps and identify management zones.

tasks.name: Drone & Precision Equipment Operation
tasks.description: Fly UAVs for crop scouting and mapping, calibrate variable-rate applicators, and maintain GPS guidance systems.

tasks.name: Soil Sampling & Testing
tasks.description: Collect geo-referenced soil samples, submit for lab analysis, and interpret nutrient levels to create variable-rate fertility prescriptions.

tasks.name: Recommendations & Reporting
tasks.description: Compile field insights into agronomic reports, present variable-rate prescriptions to farm operators, and document outcomes for continuous improvement.

title: Food Scientist
description: Research and develop new food products, test ingredients and processes for safety and quality, ensure regulatory compliance, and collaborate with manufacturing and marketing teams.

tasks.name: Product Research & Development
tasks.description: Formulate new food and beverage products, conduct bench-scale trials, optimize recipes for taste, texture, shelf life, and cost targets.

tasks.name: Laboratory Testing & Analysis
tasks.description: Perform microbiological, chemical, and sensory analyses to validate product safety, nutritional claims, and regulatory specifications.

tasks.name: Regulatory Compliance & Documentation
tasks.description: Ensure products meet FDA, USDA, and international food safety standards; prepare technical documentation for label claims and regulatory submissions.

tasks.name: Cross-functional Collaboration
tasks.description: Work with operations, marketing, and supply chain teams to scale-up products, resolve manufacturing issues, and bring innovations to market.
